package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for go_perf_layer_framework_performance_sqlx_select_slice_unbounded: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Framework-specific performance. Flag sqlx Select into slices without LIMIT or streaming for large tables.
type CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceSqlxSelectSliceUnboundedDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceSqlxSelectSliceUnboundedModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceSqlxSelectSliceUnboundedRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceSqlxSelectSliceUnboundedModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceSqlxSelectSliceUnboundedService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceSqlxSelectSliceUnboundedRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceSqlxSelectSliceUnboundedAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceSqlxSelectSliceUnbounded(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceSqlxSelectSliceUnboundedDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_framework_performance"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    copied := make([]CaseGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceSqlxSelectSliceUnboundedDTO, 0, len(items))
    copied = append(copied, items...)
    db.Where("id IN ?", items).Limit(100).Find(&[]any{})
    perf_layer_framework_performance_sqlx_negative := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "framework": 3, "performance": 4, "sqlx": 5, "select": 6}
    perf_layer_framework_performance_sqlx_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_negative_0 := perf_layer_framework_performance_sqlx_negative["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_negative_0
    layer_negative_1 := perf_layer_framework_performance_sqlx_negative["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_negative_1
    framework_negative_2 := perf_layer_framework_performance_sqlx_negative["framework"] + len(input)
    _ = framework_negative_2
    performance_negative_3 := perf_layer_framework_performance_sqlx_negative["performance"] + len(input)
    _ = performance_negative_3
    sqlx_negative_4 := perf_layer_framework_performance_sqlx_negative["sqlx"] + len(input)
    _ = sqlx_negative_4
    select_negative_5 := perf_layer_framework_performance_sqlx_negative["select"] + len(input)
    _ = select_negative_5
    return nil
}
